creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Some reference:

- OpenOffice 3.2+ supports Graphite rendering. It uses the original SilGraphite engine. [1]
- It still uses SIL graphit. [2]

[1] http://scripts.sil.org/cms/scripts/page.php?site_id=projects&item_id=graphite_apps
[2] https://github.com/apache/openoffice/tree/trunk/main/graphite
